positive: A stylized, retro-futuristic cityscape silhouette at sunset. The scene features simplified, clean architectural structures, including flying vehicles and glowing neon signs, drawn in a graphic vector style. The dominant colors are deep indigo, vibrant cyan, burnt orange, and magenta, creating high contrast against a gradient sky. The composition is centered and balanced, ideal for a t-shirt graphic. Emphasis on sharp edges, negative space, and minimalist detail. Minimalist sticker art style, perfect for direct-to-garment printing.
